title: Add tracing subscriber to aion-server
purpose: aion-server has no tracing_subscriber initialized. All tracing::debug/warn/error calls across the engine and server are silently dropped, making debugging impossible without temporary eprintln hacks.
task: Initialize tracing_subscriber::fmt in aion-server main.rs before any other initialization. Default to INFO level, configurable via RUST_LOG env var. Add structured fields (timestamps, module paths).

requirements.title: Tracing subscriber initialization
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL initialize a tracing_subscriber in main.rs before engine construction. THE SYSTEM SHALL default to INFO level and respect the RUST_LOG environment variable for level overrides.
acceptance: Server startup logs version and listening addresses at INFO level.
tracing_subscriber::fmt is initialized with timestamps and module path targets.

boundaries: SHALL NOT change the tracing instrumentation in existing code — only add the subscriber.
SHALL add tracing-subscriber as a dependency if not already present.
verification: Running the server produces visible log output at default level.
